title: 8 Verses That Hit Different When You're Actually Living Them
caption:
You know the verses.

That's not the same as living them.

The difference between quoting "Be still and know that I am God" and actually practicing it in a waiting room — that's the gap the whole Christian life lives in.

Scripture was never meant to be ammunition in an argument or decoration in a caption. It was meant to be tested. It always holds.

#faith #scripture #christianmen #godlymen #manofgod #bibleverse #biblestudy #disciplemaking
